basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) Lab Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website rcb.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026.

all_official_links.label: Download RCB Lab Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RCB Lab Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RCB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RCB Lab Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: RCB Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RCB recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) recruitment is Lab Assistant. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Lab Assistant post in the Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Lab Assistant post is B.Sc. or M.Sc. with relevant lab experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Lab Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Lab Assistant position is Rs. 20,000/- per month, plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Lab Assistant post is scheduled for 28 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Lab Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Lab Assistant role will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) located?
faq.answer: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).
